description: Component availability registry. Defines optional components and their degradation behavior when absent.

components.name: control_plane
components.degradation: No dashboard, no runaway detection, no execution trace. Hooks still function independently.

components.name: brain_b1
components.degradation: No institutional memory queries. brain_context_router hook becomes no-op.

components.name: quarantine_pipeline
components.degradation: No content quarantine scanning. Injection detection still available via injection_detect.sh.

components.name: monitor_scanner
components.degradation: No ecosystem monitoring or digest generation.

components.name: standing_orders
components.degradation: Session start produces empty Standing Orders block. Hooks still enforce but agents lack context.

components.name: state_management
components.degradation: All hooks that depend on session state will fail-open. Token tracking, loop detection, and context health disabled.

components.name: config
components.degradation: Hooks fall back to hardcoded defaults. Token estimates, detector thresholds use built-in values.
